summary.en: Managed equipment data pipelines for manufacturers.
summary.zh: 為製造商提供託管式設備資料管線。

highlight.en: DevFlight focused on operating the data pipelines that move and manage equipment data for manufacturers, rather than leaving teams to build that plumbing themselves.
highlight.zh: DevFlight 專注於營運用於傳輸與管理製造商設備資料的資料管線,讓團隊不必自行打造這套基礎設施。

summary.en: A platform where scientists share their research through videos.
summary.zh: 讓科學家透過影片分享研究成果的平台。

highlight.en: SciTok targets scientists as creators, using short video as the medium to make research more accessible and shareable to a broader audience.
highlight.zh: SciTok 以科學家作為創作者,藉由短影片這個媒介,讓研究內容更易於被更廣大的觀眾理解與分享。

summary.en: A no-code app builder for business software.
summary.zh: 用於企業軟體的無程式碼應用程式建構工具。

highlight.en: Chaser let non-engineers build apps on top of Zendesk, Salesforce, and Slack without writing code or hiring developers.
highlight.zh: Chaser 讓沒有工程背景的使用者,不必寫程式或聘請開發人員,就能在 Zendesk、Salesforce 與 Slack 之上打造應用程式。

summary.en: Puts farms inside restaurants so customers get fresher, healthier food.
summary.zh: 把農場搬進餐廳,讓顧客吃到更新鮮、更健康的食物。

highlight.en: Clayton Farms grows produce on-site inside restaurants under a "better food for more people" mission, claiming greater nutrition and flavor than conventionally sourced food.
highlight.zh: Clayton Farms 秉持「讓更多人吃到更好的食物」的使命,直接在餐廳內現場種植蔬果,主打比傳統供應方式更高的營養與風味。

summary.en: A collaborative repository for capturing and analyzing user feedback.
summary.zh: 用於收集與分析使用者回饋的協作式資料庫。

highlight.en: Herald pulls customer feedback from tools like Intercom, Front, email, and Slack, then helps teams qualify and quantify it against business goals via internal, semi-private, or public roadmaps.
highlight.zh: Herald 從 Intercom、Front、電子郵件與 Slack 等工具匯整客戶回饋,並協助團隊依商業目標進行定性與量化分析,可用於內部、半私密或公開的產品藍圖。

summary.en: Curated, story-driven travel experiences — "Disney meets Airbnb Experiences."
summary.zh: 精心策劃、富故事性的旅遊體驗——「迪士尼遇上 Airbnb 體驗」。

highlight.en: Adventurous Co positioned itself between themed entertainment and peer-hosted activities, aiming to bring Disney-grade storytelling to bookable local experiences.
highlight.zh: Adventurous Co 將自己定位在主題娛樂與在地主辦活動之間,試圖把迪士尼級的故事敘事帶入可預訂的在地體驗中。

summary.en: An API that embeds high-dimensional data like images and text.
summary.zh: 將圖像、文字等高維資料轉為嵌入向量的 API。

highlight.en: Basilica offered embeddings-as-a-service, letting developers turn images and text into vector representations through a single API instead of training their own models.
highlight.zh: Basilica 以 API 形式提供嵌入向量服務,讓開發者透過單一 API 將圖像與文字轉為向量表示,而無需自行訓練模型。

summary.en: Language models packaged as an API and SDK for enterprise apps.
summary.zh: 以 API 與 SDK 形式提供給企業應用的語言模型。

highlight.en: Sapling's messaging assistant layers on top of CRMs and messaging platforms to help support and sales reps compose replies faster.
highlight.zh: Sapling 的訊息助理疊加在 CRM 與訊息平台之上,協助客服與銷售人員更快速地撰寫回覆。

summary.en: Reviews for individual dishes that surface the best food across delivery apps.
summary.zh: 以單一菜色為單位的評論,幫你找出各外送平台上最棒的料理。

highlight.en: Simmer ranks the best-reviewed dishes across delivery apps using a custom sentiment analyzer that aggregates existing reviews from blogs, social media, and news.
highlight.zh: Simmer 運用自家的情感分析引擎,匯整部落格、社群媒體與新聞中既有的評論,跨各外送平台排序出評價最高的菜色。

summary.en: Automated QA bots for testing video games.
summary.zh: 用於遊戲測試的自動化 QA 機器人。

highlight.en: Evo.Do applied bots to game quality assurance, aiming to automate the repetitive playtesting that studios otherwise do by hand.
highlight.zh: Evo.Do 將機器人應用於遊戲品質保證,目標是自動化原本需由人工反覆進行的遊戲測試。

summary.en: Automates paperwork by turning documents into structured data.
summary.zh: 將文件轉為結構化資料,自動化繁瑣的文書作業。

highlight.en: Docucharm extracts structured data from documents so businesses can replace manual data entry with an automated pipeline.
highlight.zh: Docucharm 從文件中擷取結構化資料,讓企業能以自動化流程取代人工資料輸入。

summary.en: Online and phone ordering for restaurant takeout and delivery.
summary.zh: 為餐廳外帶與外送提供線上與電話點餐服務。

highlight.en: Bensen combines web and phone channels into one ordering system so restaurants can capture takeout and delivery orders from both.
highlight.zh: Bensen 將網路與電話兩種管道整合為單一點餐系統,讓餐廳能同時接收外帶與外送訂單。

summary.en: A personal clothing store experience in an app.
summary.zh: 以應用程式打造的個人專屬服飾店體驗。

highlight.en: PerShop framed itself as your own personal clothing store, aiming to curate apparel shopping around the individual user.
highlight.zh: PerShop 將自己定位為使用者的個人服飾店,目標是圍繞每位使用者打造量身策劃的服飾購物體驗。

summary.en: Lets employees pick their own workplace perks.
summary.zh: 讓員工自行挑選想要的職場福利。

highlight.en: Cherry had employers cover the consumer services employees actually use — like Netflix, Spotify, ClassPass, or Lyft — instead of spending on unused office perks.
highlight.zh: Cherry 讓雇主補助員工真正會用到的消費服務——例如 Netflix、Spotify、ClassPass 或 Lyft——而非把錢花在沒人用的辦公室福利上。

summary.en: A memberships platform for event organizers.
summary.zh: 為活動主辦方打造的會員制平台。

highlight.en: Pools turns ticket checkout into a membership upsell for art, music, and cultural communities, offering automated discounts, advance access, and members-only perks.
highlight.zh: Pools 將購票結帳轉化為會員制的加購環節,為藝術、音樂與文化社群提供自動折扣、提前入場與會員專屬權益。

summary.en: A social network built for your close friends.
summary.zh: 專為親密好友打造的社群網路。

highlight.en: Basement focused on small, intimate circles rather than broad public sharing, positioning itself as a private social network for close friends.
highlight.zh: Basement 著重於小而親密的社交圈,而非廣泛的公開分享,將自己定位為專屬親密好友的私密社群網路。

summary.en: In-person medical infrastructure to extend the scope and quality of virtual care.
summary.zh: 打造實體醫療基礎設施,擴大虛擬照護的範圍與品質。

highlight.en: Brick Health offered diagnostics, nursing, point-of-care testing, and phlebotomy at transparent cash prices, starting in Miami, to bridge gaps that telehealth alone can't cover.
highlight.zh: Brick Health 以透明的現金價格提供診斷、護理服務、即時檢測與抽血,自邁阿密起步,彌補單靠遠距醫療無法填補的照護缺口。

summary.en: A universal, pure-GPU HTML renderer for games and native apps.
summary.zh: 為遊戲與原生應用打造的全 GPU HTML 渲染器。

highlight.en: Built on a lightweight WebKit fork, Ultralight is a GPU-first toolkit for embedding modern HTML across Windows, macOS, Linux, Xbox, PlayStation, and ARM64, developed with leading game studios.
highlight.zh: Ultralight 建立在輕量化的 WebKit 分支之上,是一套以 GPU 為核心的工具組,可在 Windows、macOS、Linux、Xbox、PlayStation 與 ARM64 上嵌入現代 HTML,並與頂尖遊戲工作室合作開發。

summary.en: A white-label community platform for companies and communities.
summary.zh: 為企業與社群打造的白標社群平台。

highlight.en: Pitched as a white-label Bookface, Comradery let companies spin up their own customizable, branded community space to foster engagement.
highlight.zh: Comradery 自比為白標版的 Bookface,讓企業能建立可客製化、帶有自家品牌的社群空間,以促進成員互動。

summary.en: A referral-program SDK for startups.
summary.zh: 為新創公司打造的推薦計畫 SDK。

highlight.en: Avalanche packaged referral mechanics into an SDK so startups could add and run growth-driving referral programs without building them from scratch.
highlight.zh: Avalanche 將推薦機制封裝成 SDK,讓新創公司不必從零打造,就能加入並營運能驅動成長的推薦計畫。

summary.en: Building the first practical, integrated quantum computer.
summary.zh: 打造首台實用的整合式量子電腦。

highlight.en: AuroraQ aimed to be the "Dell of quantum computing," sourcing specialized processing, communication, and memory components from partners and integrating them into one working system.
highlight.zh: AuroraQ 立志成為「量子運算界的 Dell」,從合作夥伴採購處理、通訊與記憶體等專用元件,並整合為單一可運作的系統。

summary.en: A service that skips busy phone lines and shortens hold times.
summary.zh: 幫你跳過繁忙電話線、縮短等待時間的服務。

highlight.en: After pivoting from skipping club lines, Autodial covers 10,000 business phone lines across banking, telecom, and government, aiming to cut hold times from 60 minutes to 5.
highlight.zh: Autodial 從跳過夜店排隊轉型而來,如今涵蓋銀行、電信與政府等領域共 10,000 條客服電話線,目標是把等待時間從 60 分鐘縮短到 5 分鐘。

summary.en: A tool for engineers to instantly diagnose data-pipeline problems.
summary.zh: 讓工程師即時診斷資料管線問題的工具。

highlight.en: Datamode integrates with a team's existing data stack to give one place to investigate pipeline issues, reducing mean time to diagnosis and improving data reliability.
highlight.zh: Datamode 與團隊既有的資料技術堆疊整合,提供單一介面來排查管線問題,縮短平均診斷時間並提升資料可靠度。

summary.en: Fuzzing as a service for finding software bugs.
summary.zh: 以服務形式提供的模糊測試,用於找出軟體漏洞。

highlight.en: Fuzzbuzz delivered fuzz testing as a managed service, letting engineering teams surface bugs and vulnerabilities without standing up their own fuzzing infrastructure. It was later acquired.
highlight.zh: Fuzzbuzz 以託管服務形式提供模糊測試,讓工程團隊不必自建模糊測試基礎設施即可找出漏洞與安全弱點,後來被收購。

summary.en: Volk Wireless, a consumer wireless venture (Volk Fi).
summary.zh: Volk Wireless,一項面向消費者的無線通訊事業(Volk Fi)。

highlight.en: Operating under the Volk Fi brand, Volk Wireless was a consumer-facing wireless company in the YC Winter 2019 batch.
highlight.zh: Volk Wireless 以 Volk Fi 品牌營運,是 YC 2019 年冬季梯次中一家面向消費者的無線通訊公司。

summary.en: Docbot, a healthcare technology company (later acquired).
summary.zh: Docbot,一家後來被收購的醫療科技公司。

highlight.en: Docbot was a US healthcare startup from YC's Winter 2019 batch that was subsequently acquired.
highlight.zh: Docbot 是 YC 2019 年冬季梯次中一家美國醫療科技新創,後續已被收購。

summary.en: A note-taking workspace built for B2B sales teams.
summary.zh: 專為 B2B 銷售團隊打造的筆記工作空間。

highlight.en: BlitzIQ centered on capturing and organizing sales notes, tailoring the note-taking experience specifically to B2B sales workflows.
highlight.zh: BlitzIQ 著重於擷取與整理銷售筆記,將記事體驗專門針對 B2B 銷售工作流程量身打造。

summary.en: Daily telehealth care for people with COPD, CHF, hypertension, and more.
summary.zh: 為慢性阻塞性肺病、心衰竭、高血壓等患者提供每日遠距醫療照護。

highlight.en: DailyDoctor ran a telehealth clinic that monitors patients with chronic conditions day to day, with the goal of preventing avoidable hospitalizations.
highlight.zh: DailyDoctor 經營一家遠距醫療診所,逐日監測慢性病患者的狀況,目標是預防可避免的住院。

summary.en: Supply-chain data tracking and visibility technology.
summary.zh: 供應鏈資料追蹤與可視化技術。

highlight.en: Reelables works on tracking and visibility for the supply chain, positioning its technology as the future of how shipments and goods data are monitored.
highlight.zh: Reelables 專注於供應鏈的追蹤與可視化,將自家技術定位為貨物與資料監控的未來樣貌。

summary.en: An investment firm backing fintech innovation in emerging markets.
summary.zh: 專注於新興市場、支持金融科技創新的投資機構。

highlight.en: Spring in Africa backs financial-technology innovation in emerging markets, pairing capital with hands-on operational support for founders.
highlight.zh: Spring in Africa 支持新興市場的金融科技創新,將資本與對創辦人的實際營運協助結合在一起。

summary.en: Automating cybersecurity incident response with AI.
summary.zh: 運用人工智慧自動化資安事件應變。

highlight.en: Sublime Black applied artificial intelligence to automate the cybersecurity incident-response process that security teams typically handle manually.
highlight.zh: Sublime Black 運用人工智慧,自動化原本多由資安團隊人工處理的事件應變流程。

summary.en: A 24/7 emergency maintenance department for property managers and residents.
summary.zh: 為物業管理方與住戶提供全天候緊急維修服務。

highlight.en: Latchel automates maintenance coordination end-to-end and adds resident amenities, servicing over 80,000 homes across 400+ customers in all 50 US states.
highlight.zh: Latchel 端到端自動化維修協調並提供住戶增值服務,服務涵蓋美國 50 州、超過 400 個客戶旗下的 80,000 多戶住宅。

summary.en: Making "popcorn 2.0" from popped water lily seeds.
summary.zh: 用爆過的睡蓮籽製作「2.0 版爆米花」。

highlight.en: Taali makes a snack it calls popcorn 2.0 from popped water lily seeds, offering an alternative to conventional popcorn.
highlight.zh: Taali 以爆過的睡蓮籽製作號稱「2.0 版爆米花」的零食,提供有別於傳統爆米花的選擇。

summary.en: Building the future of dairy from plants using micelles.
summary.zh: 運用微胞技術以植物為原料,打造乳製品的未來。

highlight.en: Eclipse's plant-based dairy platform recreates the taste, texture, and functionality of conventional dairy using micelles, and has raised over $60M to transform the $500B dairy industry.
highlight.zh: Eclipse 的植物性乳品平台運用微胞技術,重現傳統乳製品的味道、口感與功能,並已募得逾 6,000 萬美元,致力翻轉規模達 5,000 億美元的乳製品產業。

summary.en: A blockchain intelligence platform building a safer financial system.
summary.zh: 打造更安全金融體系的區塊鏈情報平台。

highlight.en: TRM delivers blockchain intelligence to financial institutions, crypto companies, and governments to fight cryptocurrency fraud and financial crime at scale.
highlight.zh: TRM 為金融機構、加密貨幣公司與政府提供區塊鏈情報資料平台,大規模打擊加密貨幣詐騙與金融犯罪。

summary.en: Modern online payments infrastructure for the Philippines.
summary.zh: 為菲律賓打造的現代線上支付基礎設施。

highlight.en: PayMongo's APIs and plugins let Philippine businesses accept cards, e-wallets, and over-the-counter payments online, backed by investors including Founders Fund, Peter Thiel, and Stripe.
highlight.zh: PayMongo 的 API 與外掛讓菲律賓企業能在線上接受信用卡、電子錢包與臨櫃付款,投資方包括 Founders Fund、Peter Thiel 與 Stripe。

summary.en: A leading Composable CDP and AI Decisioning platform.
summary.zh: 領先的可組合式 CDP 與 AI 決策平台。

highlight.en: Hightouch lets marketing teams activate data straight from their data warehouse, building 1:1 customer experiences with data and AI agents.
highlight.zh: Hightouch 讓行銷團隊直接從資料倉儲啟用資料,運用資料與 AI 代理打造一對一的客戶體驗。

summary.en: Insurance and risk-management tools for startups and growth-stage companies.
summary.zh: 為新創與成長期公司打造的保險與風險管理工具。

highlight.en: Backed by $185M, Vouch is a technology-first insurer writing policies tailored to real startup scenarios, positioning itself as the "Stripe for payments" equivalent in business insurance.
highlight.zh: Vouch 募得 1.85 億美元,是一家技術導向的保險公司,專門針對真實的新創情境設計保單,自我定位為商業保險界的「支付界 Stripe」。

summary.en: Making diverse, high-quality human data easily available to researchers anywhere.
summary.zh: 讓任何地方的研究者都能輕鬆取得多元、高品質的人類資料。

highlight.en: Built by researchers for researchers, Prolific gives 30,000+ academic and industry users access to a vetted, diverse participant pool for human data and feedback, with a new study launched every 3 minutes.
highlight.zh: Prolific 由研究者為研究者打造,讓超過 3 萬名學界與業界使用者能取用經審核、多元的受試者群,蒐集人類資料與回饋,平均每 3 分鐘就有一項新研究展開。

summary.en: Human and AI design review for hardware engineering teams.
summary.zh: 為硬體工程團隊提供人類與 AI 協作的設計審查。

highlight.en: CoLab's Design Engagement System runs more effective design reviews and launched AutoReview, an AI peer checker that marks up 2D and 3D files, trusted by Ford, Komatsu, and Lockheed Martin.
highlight.zh: CoLab 的設計協作系統能進行更有效率的設計審查,並推出 AutoReview——一款能標註 2D 與 3D 檔案的 AI 同儕檢查工具,獲 Ford、Komatsu 與 Lockheed Martin 等企業採用。

summary.en: In-person, hybrid, and virtual event management software.
summary.zh: 實體、混合與線上活動的管理軟體。

highlight.en: InEvent unifies registration, mobile app, check-in, badge printing, and budgeting into one platform with integrations to Salesforce, Marketo, and Oracle, having supported over 12,400 events.
highlight.zh: InEvent 將報名、行動應用、報到、識別證列印與預算等功能整合於單一平台,並串接 Salesforce、Marketo 與 Oracle,至今已支援超過 12,400 場活動。

summary.en: Modern ecommerce built for petite women.
summary.zh: 專為嬌小身形女性打造的現代電商。

highlight.en: Short Story is a style discovery platform serving the underserved petite segment — the average US woman is 5'4" and petite — curating clothes for style, quality, and fit.
highlight.zh: Short Story 是一個風格探索平台,服務長期被忽視的嬌小身形客群——美國女性平均身高約 5 呎 4 吋且屬嬌小身形——並依風格、品質與合身度精選服飾。

summary.en: A non-profit helping build a smaller, fairer, safer justice system.
summary.zh: 致力打造更精簡、更公平、更安全司法體系的非營利組織。

highlight.en: Recidiviz built an open-source platform that ingests, links, and standardizes siloed criminal justice data, giving agencies usable insights to track goals and drive evidence-based reform.
highlight.zh: Recidiviz 打造一個開源平台,匯入、串接並標準化分散的刑事司法資料,讓政府機關取得可用的洞察,以追蹤目標並推動以證據為本的改革。

summary.en: Customer data collection, safeguarding, and activation for healthcare.
summary.zh: 為醫療業提供客戶資料的收集、保護與啟用。

highlight.en: Freshpaint makes healthcare websites and marketing stacks HIPAA compliant by controlling how sensitive patient data flows to third-party analytics and marketing tools.
highlight.zh: Freshpaint 透過控管敏感病患資料流向第三方分析與行銷工具的方式,讓醫療網站與行銷技術堆疊符合 HIPAA 規範。

summary.en: Delivering fruits and vegetables to multi-segment restaurants in Indonesia.
summary.zh: 在印尼為多元類型餐廳配送蔬果。

highlight.en: Eden Farm cuts through Indonesia's multi-layered food supply chain, giving farmers revenue guarantees and demand forecasts while offering restaurants stable prices and quality, supported by its own ordering, ERP, and farmer apps.
highlight.zh: Eden Farm 打通印尼多層中間商的食品供應鏈,為農民提供收入保障與需求預測,同時讓餐廳享有穩定的價格與品質,並以自家的點貨、ERP 與農民應用程式作為支撐。

summary.en: Commission-free US stock investing for Southeast Asia — "Robinhood for SEA."
summary.zh: 為東南亞打造的免佣金美股投資服務——「東南亞版 Robinhood」。

highlight.en: Gotrade lets Southeast Asians invest and trade in US stocks, options, and ETFs, bringing fractional access to American markets to a region historically underserved by brokerages.
highlight.zh: Gotrade 讓東南亞民眾能投資與交易美股、選擇權與 ETF,將美國市場的零股投資管道帶進長期被券商忽視的地區。

summary.en: A construction and industrial last-mile logistics platform.
summary.zh: 建築與工業領域的最後一哩物流平台。

highlight.en: Curri provides on-demand, last-mile delivery for construction and adjacent industries through a nationwide fleet of cars, trucks, and flatbeds.
highlight.zh: Curri 透過遍布全國的轎車、卡車與平板車隊,為建築及相關產業提供隨需的最後一哩配送服務。

summary.en: Giving homebuyers more certainty and negotiating power.
summary.zh: 讓購屋者擁有更多確定性與談判籌碼。

highlight.en: UpEquity removes contingencies from home offers so buyers gain stronger negotiating leverage when purchasing their next home.
highlight.zh: UpEquity 移除購屋出價中的附帶條件,讓買家在購買下一間房屋時擁有更強的談判優勢。

summary.en: Modern pediatric primary, urgent, and remote care for kids.
summary.zh: 為兒童打造的現代基層、急症與遠距照護。

highlight.en: Brave Care runs kid-only primary and urgent care clinics at roughly 1/10th the cost of an ER trip and a quarter of the time, handling everything from stitches and broken bones to fevers.
highlight.zh: Brave Care 經營專屬兒童的基層與急症診所,費用約為急診的十分之一、所需時間約為四分之一,從縫合、骨折到發燒都能處理。

summary.en: An AI recruiter for India's massive blue-collar workforce.
summary.zh: 為印度龐大藍領勞動力打造的 AI 招募系統。

highlight.en: Vahan applies AI to recruiting at the scale of India's blue-collar labor market, automating the matching and hiring of frontline workers.
highlight.zh: Vahan 將 AI 應用於印度藍領勞動市場規模的招募,自動化第一線員工的媒合與聘用流程。

summary.en: A LatAm tech-enabled real estate broker for buying and selling homes.
summary.zh: 拉丁美洲科技驅動的房地產仲介,協助買賣房屋。

highlight.en: Mudafy brings professionalism to LatAm real estate with 360° virtual tours, online showing booking, and benchmark pricing, plus tools that it says make agents 10x more efficient than traditional realtors.
highlight.zh: Mudafy 以 360 度虛擬看屋、線上預約看屋與基準定價,為拉丁美洲房地產帶來專業化,並提供號稱讓經紀人效率達傳統仲介 10 倍的工具。

summary.en: Helping healthcare workers find their next career opportunity.
summary.zh: 協助醫療從業人員尋找下一份工作機會。

highlight.en: DirectShifts connects physicians, nurses, advanced practitioners, and allied health workers with hospitals, clinics, and telehealth companies for short-term and full-time roles.
highlight.zh: DirectShifts 將醫師、護理師、進階執業人員與相關醫療人員,媒合至醫院、診所與遠距醫療公司的短期與全職職缺。

summary.en: A zero-inventory, zero-returns factory-to-consumer apparel company.
summary.zh: 零庫存、零退貨、由工廠直達消費者的服飾公司。

highlight.en: Binks modernizes India's fragmented tailoring market by letting women order online, get fitted at home, and receive made-to-measure clothes like saree blouses delivered to their door.
highlight.zh: Binks 翻新印度零散的裁縫市場,讓女性能在線上下單、於家中量身,並將紗麗罩衫等量身訂製服飾直接送到府上。

summary.en: Modern, user-focused observability built on OpenTelemetry.
summary.zh: 建立在 OpenTelemetry 之上、以使用者為核心的現代可觀測性平台。

highlight.en: Embrace ties frontend performance data to backend observability so SRE and DevOps teams see real customer impact, with users including The New York Times, Marriott, and Warby Parker.
highlight.zh: Embrace 將前端效能資料與後端可觀測性串連,讓 SRE 與 DevOps 團隊看見對真實用戶的影響,客戶包括《紐約時報》、萬豪與 Warby Parker。

summary.en: A payment and personal-loan platform for LatAm micro and small businesses.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲微型與小型企業打造的支付與個人貸款平台。

highlight.en: Zippi offers self-employed people in LatAm weekly-invoiced personal loans and payments through an app with no annual fee, so they can focus on growing their business.
highlight.zh: Zippi 透過應用程式,為拉丁美洲的自雇者提供按週開立帳單的個人貸款與支付服務,且不收年費,讓他們能專注於業務成長。

summary.en: Building a better way to meet online.
summary.zh: 打造更好的線上聚會方式。

highlight.en: Gather is a video chat platform that overlays a virtual world on the physical one for working, socializing, and learning, having raised $77M from Sequoia and Index Ventures.
highlight.zh: Gather 是一個視訊聊天平台,在實體世界之上疊加虛擬空間,供工作、社交與學習之用,並已自 Sequoia 與 Index Ventures 募得 7,700 萬美元。

summary.en: Fashionable college, NBA, and MLS apparel.
summary.zh: 時尚的大學、NBA 與 MLS 服飾品牌。

highlight.en: Hype and Vice makes fashion-forward licensed apparel spanning college sports, the NBA, and MLS, aiming to make fan gear something people actually want to wear.
highlight.zh: Hype and Vice 推出橫跨大學運動、NBA 與 MLS 的時尚授權服飾,目標是讓球迷服裝成為人們真正樂於穿著的單品。

summary.en: The design system layer for coding agents.
summary.zh: 為程式撰寫代理打造的設計系統層。

highlight.en: zeroheight lets product teams document, manage, and fine-tune AI-optimized design systems so they can ship at 10x speed without sacrificing UX or brand identity.
highlight.zh: zeroheight 讓產品團隊能記錄、管理並微調為 AI 最佳化的設計系統,使其能以 10 倍速度出貨,又不犧牲使用者體驗與品牌識別。

summary.en: A subscription pharmacy for chronic-disease patients in LatAm.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲慢性病患者打造的訂閱制藥局。

highlight.en: Vitau delivers medicine monthly to chronic-disease patients and helps them with insurance reimbursement, currently operating in Mexico.
highlight.zh: Vitau 每月為慢性病患者配送藥品,並協助處理保險理賠,目前在墨西哥營運。

summary.en: Tax automation infrastructure for consumers and businesses in Mexico.
summary.zh: 為墨西哥消費者與企業打造的稅務自動化基礎設施。

highlight.en: Heru automatically files taxes, deducts expenses, issues invoices, and collects payments from one app, targeting the 14 million digital workers and SMEs in Mexico who struggle with tax matters.
highlight.zh: Heru 透過單一應用程式自動申報稅務、列舉支出、開立發票與收款,鎖定墨西哥 1,400 萬名為稅務問題所苦的數位工作者與中小企業。

summary.en: Discovering the true signals of disease to power life-changing drugs.
summary.zh: 挖掘疾病的真實訊號,以推動足以改變人生的藥物。

highlight.en: Sequence Bio improves drug target discovery — where 90% of candidates fail — by leveraging the Newfoundland founder effect to find clearer disease signals.
highlight.zh: Sequence Bio 著力改善藥物標靶探索(90% 的候選藥物會失敗),運用紐芬蘭的奠基者效應找出更清晰的疾病訊號。

summary.en: Software that helps restaurants manage their online orders.
summary.zh: 協助餐廳管理線上訂單的軟體。

highlight.en: Cuboh consolidates a restaurant's third-party delivery orders into one system, removing the hassle of juggling multiple online ordering platforms. It was later acquired.
highlight.zh: Cuboh 將餐廳的第三方外送訂單整合至單一系統,免去同時操作多個線上點餐平台的麻煩,後來被收購。

summary.en: A financial connectivity API for consumer liabilities.
summary.zh: 用於消費者債務的金融連接 API。

highlight.en: Method provides connectivity to consumer credit and liability accounts, enabling end-to-end refinancing, real-time account data, and one-click checkout.
highlight.zh: Method 提供連接消費者信用與債務帳戶的能力,實現端到端再融資、即時帳戶資料存取與一鍵結帳。

summary.en: A talent platform for the legal industry.
summary.zh: 為法律產業打造的人才平台。

highlight.en: Flo focuses on connecting legal talent, building a dedicated platform for hiring and staffing within the legal sector.
highlight.zh: Flo 專注於媒合法律人才,為法律業界的招募與人力配置打造專屬平台。

summary.en: A mobile app that gets nightlife customers to the fun, faster.
summary.zh: 讓夜生活顧客更快享受樂趣的行動應用程式。

highlight.en: LineLeap sells LineSkip passes, drinks, cover, and event tickets at 400+ top nightlife venues, giving venues new revenue streams and marketing tools, with over 1 million customers acquired.
highlight.zh: LineLeap 在 400 多家頂級夜生活場所販售免排隊通行證、飲品、入場費與活動門票,為場所創造新營收與行銷工具,累計已獲取超過 100 萬名顧客。

summary.en: A platform connecting shippers to carriers for freight.
summary.zh: 連接貨主與運輸業者的貨運平台。

highlight.en: Trella improves driver efficiency and earnings while giving shippers transparent pricing, reliable carriers, real-time shipment tracking, and insights into their transportation trends.
highlight.zh: Trella 提升司機的效率與收入,同時為貨主提供透明定價、可靠的運力、即時貨物追蹤,以及運輸趨勢的洞察。

summary.en: A global dollar account powered by stablecoins.
summary.zh: 由穩定幣驅動的全球美元帳戶。

highlight.en: Coco Wallet lets users send, spend, save, and earn in digital dollars, combining a neobank-like experience with Web3 to give instant access to borderless money without banks.
highlight.zh: Coco Wallet 讓使用者以數位美元收付、消費、儲蓄與賺取收益,結合類似新型銀行的體驗與 Web3,讓人不必透過銀行即可即時取用無國界的穩定資金。

summary.en: An AI negotiation agent that helps companies save money on SaaS.
summary.zh: 協助企業節省 SaaS 開支的 AI 議價代理。

highlight.en: Vendr uses real contract data to benchmark software prices and automatically secure better deals, so companies stop overpaying for SaaS. It was later acquired.
highlight.zh: Vendr 運用真實合約資料來對軟體價格進行基準比較,並自動爭取更優惠的條件,讓企業不再為 SaaS 多付錢,後來被收購。

summary.en: An autonomous homebuilding factory tackling the $1.7 trillion housing crisis.
summary.zh: 應對 1.7 兆美元住房危機的自主造屋工廠。

highlight.en: Pippin aims to automate the labor-intensive steps of home construction, starting in the accessory dwelling unit (ADU) market under its Rent the Backyard brand, an industry with no labor-productivity growth since 1947.
highlight.zh: Pippin 目標是自動化造屋中高度依賴人力的環節,並以 Rent the Backyard 品牌從附屬住宅單元(ADU)市場切入——這個產業自 1947 年以來勞動生產力毫無成長。

summary.en: Modern payroll infrastructure for modern work.
summary.zh: 為現代工作型態打造的現代薪資基礎設施。

highlight.en: Zeal builds payroll infrastructure designed for new and flexible models of work, modernizing how companies run and embed payroll.
highlight.zh: Zeal 打造專為新型態與彈性工作模式設計的薪資基礎設施,革新企業運行與嵌入薪資功能的方式。

summary.en: An on-demand fuel delivery service in India.
summary.zh: 印度的隨需燃油配送服務。

highlight.en: MyPetrolPump brings the gas station to your doorstep, addressing India's shortage of fuel stations by serving fleet users like schools, cab rentals, and logistics operators. It was later acquired.
highlight.zh: MyPetrolPump 把加油站送到家門口,以服務學校、租車與物流業者等車隊客戶,來緩解印度加油站不足的問題,後來被收購。

summary.en: Helping companies scale marketing campaigns through WhatsApp.
summary.zh: 協助企業透過 WhatsApp 擴大行銷活動規模。

highlight.en: treble.ai lets businesses build and send WhatsApp conversations at scale with analytics to improve performance, lifting conversion across every stage of the funnel.
highlight.zh: treble.ai 讓企業能大規模建立並發送 WhatsApp 對話,並以分析數據優化成效,提升行銷漏斗各階段的轉換率。

summary.en: Best-in-class company intelligence data.
summary.zh: 頂尖的公司情報資料。

highlight.en: PredictLeads structures public information on companies so sales teams can spot buy-mode prospects, quant funds can time trades, and VCs can predict upcoming fundraises.
highlight.zh: PredictLeads 將公司的公開資訊結構化,讓銷售團隊能辨識處於採購意向的潛在客戶、量化基金能掌握交易時機,創投則能預測即將到來的募資。

summary.en: An AI-powered, all-in-one business platform for content creators.
summary.zh: 為內容創作者打造、由 AI 驅動的一站式商業平台。

highlight.en: Beacons helps creators run smarter businesses with integrated websites, email marketing, ecommerce, and more, all from a single platform.
highlight.zh: Beacons 以單一平台整合網站、電子郵件行銷與電商等功能,協助創作者更聰明地經營自己的事業。

summary.en: Software that helps employees learn from experts at their company.
summary.zh: 幫助員工向公司內部專家學習的軟體。

highlight.en: Aimed at companies with 500+ employees, Together helps L&D teams run mentoring programs by matching employees with the most relevant internal mentor and tracking the relationship, integrating with Outlook and GSuite. It was later acquired.
highlight.zh: Together 鎖定 500 人以上的企業,協助學習發展團隊運作導師計畫,將員工與最合適的內部導師媒合並追蹤關係進展,並與 Outlook 及 GSuite 整合,後來被收購。

summary.en: The fastest way for developers to build app notifications.
summary.zh: 讓開發者最快速地為應用打造通知功能。

highlight.en: Courier's APIs and visual designer unify email, push, in-app, Slack, and SMS so developers deliver any message to the best channel with one API call — "Stripe, for notifications."
highlight.zh: Courier 的 API 與視覺化設計工具整合電子郵件、推播、應用內訊息、Slack 與簡訊,讓開發者只需一次 API 呼叫,就能將訊息送往最合適的管道——堪稱「通知界的 Stripe」。

summary.en: Helping people test, improve, and freeze their sperm.
summary.zh: 協助人們檢測、改善與冷凍精子。

highlight.en: Founded at Harvard and backed by $40M, Legacy challenges the view of fertility as a women's issue with mail-in sperm testing and freezing kits, improvement products, telehealth, and DNA analysis.
highlight.zh: Legacy 於哈佛創立,募得 4,000 萬美元,以郵寄式精子檢測與冷凍套組、精子改善產品、遠距醫療與 DNA 分析,挑戰將生育視為「女性議題」的觀念。

summary.en: Building AI therapeutics for physical health conditions like IBS.
summary.zh: 為腸躁症等生理疾病打造 AI 治療方案。

highlight.en: Mindset Health uses machine learning and LLMs to deliver adaptive, scalable AI therapy for gastrointestinal conditions like IBS, learning from therapy data and outcomes to skip the waitlist.
highlight.zh: Mindset Health 運用機器學習與大型語言模型,為腸躁症等腸胃疾病提供可調適、可擴展的 AI 治療,並從治療資料與成效中學習,免去排隊候診。

summary.en: Software for commercial real estate owners to manage capital spend.
summary.zh: 供商用不動產業主管理資本支出的軟體。

highlight.en: Banner is an operating system for real estate teams that consolidates communications, workflows, spreadsheets, and files, automating 80%+ of admin work and saving up to 10% on project costs.
highlight.zh: Banner 是房地產團隊的作業系統,整合溝通、工作流程、試算表與檔案,自動化 80% 以上的行政工作,並可為專案省下最多 10% 的成本。

summary.en: Training and connecting untapped talent with global opportunities.
summary.zh: 培訓尚未被發掘的人才,並為其媒合全球機會。

highlight.en: Microverse trains underserved talent worldwide and connects them to global career opportunities, opening up remote work to people regardless of location.
highlight.zh: Microverse 培訓全球未被充分發掘的人才,並為其媒合全球職涯機會,讓人們不受地理位置限制也能投入遠端工作。

summary.en: A subscription pharmacy for patients with chronic diseases.
summary.zh: 為慢性病患者打造的訂閱制藥局。

highlight.en: Digi-Prex serves chronic-disease patients in India with a subscription pharmacy model, providing recurring medication delivery for ongoing conditions.
highlight.zh: Digi-Prex 以訂閱制藥局模式服務印度的慢性病患者,為長期病況提供持續的藥品配送。

summary.en: Building sustainable homes fast with construction technology.
summary.zh: 運用營建科技快速興建永續住宅。

highlight.en: Green Canopy NODE pairs flat-pack, Ikea-like house assembly kits made in its Seattle factory with a vertically integrated developer and contractor operating in Seattle and Portland.
highlight.zh: Green Canopy NODE 將其西雅圖工廠生產、類似 Ikea 的平板包房屋組裝套件,與在西雅圖與波特蘭營運的垂直整合開發商兼承包商結合在一起。

summary.en: AI customer reputation and performance management for restaurant chains.
summary.zh: 為連鎖餐廳打造的 AI 顧客口碑與營運績效管理。

highlight.en: Superorder helps restaurant chains build loyalty, improve operations, and maximize profit, with partners including Marco's Pizza, KFC, Pizza Hut, and Del Taco.
highlight.zh: Superorder 協助連鎖餐廳建立顧客忠誠度、改善營運並提升獲利,合作夥伴包括 Marco's Pizza、KFC、Pizza Hut 與 Del Taco。

summary.en: A technology school positioning itself as the university of the future.
summary.zh: 自詡為未來大學的科技學院。

highlight.en: Juno College of Technology offers career-focused tech education in Canada, reframing the traditional university model around modern, in-demand skills.
highlight.zh: Juno College of Technology 在加拿大提供以職涯為導向的科技教育,圍繞現代且高需求的技能,重新定義傳統大學模式。

summary.en: Open-source, design-centric software for interacting with blockchains.
summary.zh: 以設計為核心的開源區塊鏈互動軟體。

highlight.en: Rainbow is a design-led, open-source wallet that makes interacting with blockchains and Web3 more approachable for everyday users.
highlight.zh: Rainbow 是一款以設計為主導的開源錢包,讓一般使用者能更容易地與區塊鏈及 Web3 互動。

summary.en: Digital-first debt management for Latin America.
summary.zh: 以數位為先的拉丁美洲債務管理服務。

highlight.en: Tranqui uses analytics and machine learning to build personalized repayment plans, letting users manage debt on their own terms through flexible digital channels for a higher repayment success rate.
highlight.zh: Tranqui 運用分析與機器學習打造個人化的還款方案,讓使用者透過彈性的數位管道按自身步調管理債務,以提高還款成功率。

summary.en: Building robots for dull, dirty, and dangerous jobs.
summary.zh: 為枯燥、骯髒與危險的工作打造機器人。

highlight.en: Lucid Bots makes cleaning drones that wash windows, roofs, stadium domes, and tanks up to 8x faster, plus a ground-based pressure-washing robot, targeting an industry with 200% annual turnover.
highlight.zh: Lucid Bots 製造清潔無人機,能以最快 8 倍的速度清洗窗戶、屋頂、體育館圓頂與工業槽體,並推出地面式高壓清洗機器人,鎖定年流動率達 200% 的清潔產業。

summary.en: Affordable financing for trade-school students — "SoFi for trade students."
summary.zh: 為技職學生提供平價融資——「技職版 SoFi」。

highlight.en: Fynn brings fair, affordable private loans to the trade space, helping students afford training for in-demand careers like electricians, nurses, welders, and pharmacists.
highlight.zh: Fynn 為技職領域帶來公平、平價的私人貸款,協助學生負擔電工、護理師、焊工與藥師等高需求職業的培訓費用。

summary.en: A Spark-on-Kubernetes data engineering platform.
summary.zh: 建立在 Kubernetes 上的 Spark 資料工程平台。

highlight.en: Data Mechanics offered a managed Spark-on-Kubernetes platform and was acquired by NetApp in 2021, living on as Ocean for Apache Spark in the Spot.io portfolio.
highlight.zh: Data Mechanics 提供託管式的 Spark-on-Kubernetes 平台,並於 2021 年被 NetApp 收購,現以 Ocean for Apache Spark 之名納入 Spot.io 產品組合。

summary.en: Modern medical billing software for healthcare practices.
summary.zh: 為醫療診所打造的現代醫療帳務軟體。

highlight.en: Apero brings transparency and ease to medical billing — covering eligibility, claims, BI, and patient payments — and integrates with leading EHRs, serving practices nationwide.
highlight.zh: Apero 為醫療帳務帶來透明與便利,涵蓋資格查核、理賠、商業智慧與病患付款,並與主流電子病歷系統整合,服務全美各地的診所。
